_comment: Gemini CLI v0.43.0 on Windows abandoned the array-shaped logs.json that the mac GeminiUsageReader expects. Per-project logs.json is either absent or an empty `[]` placeholder. Actual prompt history lives in JSONL session files under `~/.gemini/tmp/<project>/chats/session-<iso>-<short-hash>.jsonl`. The format below is one such file, sanitized. The fixture is JSON-encoded (object containing an array of the lines) so it can be loaded by tests that need both the raw JSONL string and the parsed records.
_format: JSONL (one JSON object per line) — NOT a JSON array

session_header.startTime: ISO-8601 with fractional seconds and Z
session_header.lastUpdated: ISO-8601 with fractional seconds and Z

user_prompt.timestamp: ISO-8601 with fractional seconds and Z
user_prompt.content: [{ text: string }]  -- array, NOT a flat message string

model_reply.timestamp: ISO-8601 with fractional seconds and Z
model_reply.content: string  -- when type==gemini, content is a flat string, not an array

$set.lastUpdated: ISO-8601 with fractional seconds and Z
